name: Full complex bundle (RBO + trailing pf_sl + trailing pf_tgt + move_sl) — _default baseline

params.complex: RBO + window + sqoff + pf_sl 80 trail 20/10 + pf_tgt 50 trail 30/10/5 + move_sl 300s trail_after

expected: Engine handles all toggles together; baseline qty for ratio comparisons

name: Full bundle + runaway ×100,000 — admin cap MUST clamp
expected: avg_fill_qty == 10M regardless of multiplier; PnL inflates but engine survives

name: Full bundle + trader_safe ×0.01 — tiny exposure, trailing pf_sl rarely fires
expected: avg_fill_qty ~ 1% baseline; cumulative PnL tiny so trailing pf_sl unlikely to bind

name: Custom 1-slot EURUSD with reverse-on-SL + 5 max re-executions
expected: Each SL hit flips the position; tracks fills both directions; max_re caps reverses

name: Custom 3 symbols × 3 strategies (EMA / RSI / Bollinger) — alice ×2.0
expected: All 9 slots run; avg_fill_qty == 2 × matched-strategy baseline

name: Custom portfolio: ALL slots disabled — must raise 'No enabled slots'
expected: ValueError: No enabled strategy slots in portfolio
error: ValueError('No enabled strategy slots in portfolio')

name: Custom portfolio: 0 slots — must raise
expected: ValueError on empty enabled_slots
error: ValueError('No enabled strategy slots in portfolio')

name: Custom: squareoff (13:00) BEFORE entry_start (14:00) — engine should still complete
expected: No trades fire (squareoff blocks all entries before window opens); 0 trades

name: Empty allowlist [] blocks any symbol on save
expected: HTTP 403 — empty list means no instruments allowed

observations.error: Instrument 'EURUSD' is not in user 'noaccess's allowed_instruments. Ask admin to update the allowlist.

name: Allowlist case-insensitive matching: ['eurusd'] vs symbol EURUSD
expected: HTTP 200 — server uppercases both sides before comparison

name: Save fails on FIRST out-of-allowlist slot in multi-slot portfolio
expected: HTTP 403 with descriptive 'BTCUSD not in allowlist' message

observations.error: Instrument 'BTCUSD' is not in user 'alice_only's allowed_instruments. Ask admin to update the allowlist.

name: FX_9_Slot + reverse-on-SL + 3 max re-executions, trader_agg ×3.0
expected: Reversals double-count toward total_trades; avg_qty == 3 × baseline

name: Custom Range Breakout 3-leg (1,2,3 lots) — alice ×2.0
expected: 3 distinct fill quantities (1×, 2×, 3× base) all scaled by alice ×2.0

name: pf_tgt=$5 + pf_sl=$100 — target should clip first if any profit run-up
expected: If a profitable trade happens, pf_clip_reason=TARGET (not STOPLOSS)

name: Squareoff 10:00 New_York (= 15:00 UTC) on FX_9_Slot
expected: No fills past 15:00 UTC each day

name: Very narrow entry window 12:00-12:10 UTC
expected: Fills cluster at hour 12 only; significantly fewer trades than baseline

name: run_on_days = ['Wed'] only — single weekday filter
expected: All fills on Wednesday only; weekday histogram shows {Wed: N}

name: Allocation_mode='percentage' with allocations summing to 130% (over)
expected: Engine accepts; capital scales by pct/100 per slot — over-allocation just means leverage

name: Existing FX_9_Slot + full complex bundle, trader_safe ×0.01
expected: avg_fill_qty == 1% baseline; many trades fire but PnL stays small

name: Per-user portfolio CRUD round-trip (save -> load -> verify -> delete)
expected: All three calls 200; loaded portfolio matches saved shape

name: Cross-user load isolation: alice can't load bob's portfolio
expected: HTTP 404 — alice's portfolios/<alice>/ doesn't have bob's file

name: Two users back-to-back run the same custom portfolio — no shared-state bug
expected: Both backtests complete cleanly with their own multipliers

name: Edge case: lots=1e-6 (six-decimal micro-lot)
expected: HTTP 200 — JSON serialization preserves the tiny float

name: Admin live-edit picked up immediately by next /api/users/me call
expected: No restart needed; users.json read every call
detail: alice multiplier before=2.0, after admin save=7.0

name: Resilience: corrupt users.json -> picker endpoint still returns a (fallback) list
expected: load_users catches JSONDecodeError and returns _default fallback
